task_completion.description: Zotero application is open and displaying the library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Zotero application window is visible on the screen, showing a list of items in the middle pane.

task_completion.description: The Einstein paper is located and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paper titled 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' is highlighted or selected in the Zotero item list.

task_completion.description: The publication year for the Einstein paper is corrected to 1905.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane for 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies', the 'Date' field displays '1905'.

task_completion.description: The Shannon paper is located and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paper titled 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' is highlighted or selected in the Zotero item list.

task_completion.description: The publication year for the Shannon paper is corrected to 1948.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane for 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication', the 'Date' field displays '1948'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Zotero GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Zotero application interface being actively used (e.g., items selected, text fields focused), rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The years '1905' and '1948' are entered into the actual Zotero metadata fields, not a separate text document or terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete or alter the rest of the library.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Zotero item list still displays multiple other papers (the library originally contained 10 papers).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct publication year for Albert Einstein's 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' is 1905. The correct publication year for Claude E. Shannon's 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' is 1948. The VLM should verify that these exact years are entered into the 'Date' field of the respective papers in Zotero.
